CHAMP-TRIGGERSKILLBONUS.title: Skill Bonus
CHAMP-TRIGGERSKILLBONUS.description:
Whenever you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] while in a [gold]Stance[/gold], trigger that Stance's bonus effect.
You can trigger up to [blue]3[/blue] Skill Bonuses in a [gold]Stance[/gold].
Skill Bonuses triggered by card effects do not count towards this limit.
